description: Syncs ZAK memory records to Supabase to maintain persistent state across sessions. Supports receipt records, capability state, and session context. Keyed idempotency on record_id prevents duplicate writes. Does not read from Supabase — write-only sync surface.

execution_receipt_hash.description: Optional. Links this sync operation to a ZAKAI execution receipt for audit trail continuity.

payload.description: The record payload to upsert. Must be serialisable to JSON.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this record. Used as the idempotency key. For receipts, use the receipt_id. For capabilities, use capability_id + version.

record_type.description: The type of record being synced.
